testcase.name: test_complete_redirect_without_auth_returns_401

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 but got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:77: in test_complete_redirect_without_auth_returns_401 assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 but got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 but got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_complete_redirect_accepts_session_token_field

failure.message:
AssertionError: Getting old 'session may have expired' error - fix may not have worked! Detail: Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again. assert ('session may have expired' not in 'failed to c...order again.'
'session may have expired' is contained here: failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again. ? ++++++++++++++++++++++++ or 'session_token' in '{"detail":"failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again."}') + where '{"detail":"failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again."}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf868b122ea20>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf868b122ea20> = '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}'.lower + where '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}' = str('{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}') + where '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}' = <Response [400]>.text

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:105: in test_complete_redirect_accepts_session_token_field assert "session may have expired" not in detail.lower() or "session_token" in str(response.text).lower(), ( E AssertionError: Getting old 'session may have expired' error - fix may not have worked! Detail: Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again. E assert ('session may have expired' not in 'failed to c...order again.' E E 'session may have expired' is contained here: E failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again. E ? ++++++++++++++++++++++++ or 'session_token' in '{"detail":"failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again."}') E + where '{"detail":"failed to complete gocardless redirect flow. the session may have expired. please try creating the order again."}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf868b122ea20>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf868b122ea20> = '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}'.lower E + where '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}' = str('{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}') E + where '{"detail":"Failed to complete GoCardless redirect flow. The session may have expired. Please try creating the order again."}' = <Response [400]>.text

testcase.name: test_bank_transfer_with_product_returns_gocardless_url
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:169: in test_bank_transfer_with_product_returns_gocardless_url one_time_products = [p for p in products if not p.get("is_subscription", False) and p.get("active", True)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:169: in <listcomp> one_time_products = [p for p in products if not p.get("is_subscription", False) and p.get("active", True)] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_stripe_checkout_with_product
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:352: in test_stripe_checkout_with_product active_products = [p for p in products if p.get("active", True) and not p.get("is_subscription", False)] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_gocardless_redirect_fix.py:352: in <listcomp> active_products = [p for p in products if p.get("active", True) and not p.get("is_subscription", False)] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
